About

C. York

I'm an AI strategist and thought leader focused on helping organizations understand and deploy artificial intelligence in ways that create real, lasting value.

With a background spanning technology strategy, organizational change, and AI implementation, I work at the intersection of what's technically possible and what actually works inside complex organizations.

I believe the biggest challenges in the AI era aren't technical — they're human. Getting the strategy right, building the right culture, and aligning incentives matters more than picking the right model.

What I'm focused on

  • → Building AI strategy frameworks for executive teams and boards
  • → Writing about the practical realities of AI adoption at scale
  • → Advising organizations on responsible AI governance and deployment
  • → Speaking on AI transformation, organizational readiness, and the future of work

Get in touch

I'm always interested in conversations with leaders thinking seriously about AI strategy and transformation. Reach out here or connect with me on LinkedIn.
